message:
Convert OAuth2Client::new() from panicking to Result-returning

Replace expect("Failed to create HTTP client") with error propagation
via ? operator, returning OAuthResult<Self>. The HTTP client builder
timeout configuration can fail in edge cases (e.g., TLS backend
initialization), and panicking in a constructor prevents callers from
handling the failure gracefully. Update test to call .unwrap() on the
new Result return type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
